name: a11y-check
description: Accessibility analyzer for React JSX/TSX files that catches issues automated tools miss

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test tests/rules/altText.test.ts tests/rules/buttonLabel.test.ts tests/rules/inputLabel.test.ts tests/rules/linkText.test.ts tests/rules/interactiveRole.test.ts tests/rules/ariaValidAttr.test.ts tests/rules/langAttribute.test.ts tests/rules/headingOrder.test.ts tests/rules/linkHref.test.ts tests/rules/iframeTitle.test.ts tests/rules/autoplayMedia.test.ts tests/config.test.ts tests/filter.test.ts

author: Muhammad Usman
